name: COUNTERFLOW
description: COUNTERFLOW is a fast-paced lane-switching driving game. Avoid oncoming cars, survive as long as you can, and break your best record. Simple controls, clean visuals, and increasing speed make every run intense and addictive.
instructions: Desktop Left Right Arrow ndash Move between lanes A D ndash Move between lanes Space ndash Pause Resume Mobile Tap left right side of the screen ndash Move between lanes Tap top area of the screen ndash Pause
